app_release_notes: v0.14.7 - New Rifle & Setup screen. Edit your rifle, shooter, components, and test-session info in a clean Loadscope form (Workbook menu -> Rifle & Setup) instead of hunting for cells in the Excel grid - it saves straight into your workbook. This is the first step of bringing Loadscope's clean format to the working app, not just the demo. Includes all 0.14.2-0.14.6 fixes.
